summary: Center-based child care voucher enrollment has more than doubled since Fiscal 2022. ACS attributes the surge to its March 2023 launch of MyCity, the city's first online child care benefits application, combined with expanded outreach in high-need neighborhoods that sharply increased use of non-mandated, low-income vouchers.

sources.label: ACS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing since the MyCity portal launched and outreach expanded
